targets.query:
from(bucket: "ran_kpis")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ran_kpis")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cqi_avg")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "ran_kpis")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ran_kpis")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "dl_bler_percent")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "ran_kpis")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ran_kpis")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ul_bler_percent")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: PRB Utilization (Proxy, %)
panels.description: APPROXIMATED — this is a scheduling-activity proxy, not a true PRB-count counter. See project README for details.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "ran_kpis")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ran_kpis")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "prb_utilization_percent_proxy")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "ran_kpis")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ran_kpis")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ho_success_rate_percent")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: RSRP Proxy (PUSCH SNR, dB)
panels.description: NOT REAL RSRP — this is uplink PUSCH SNR, used as a proxy since true RSRP requires UE measurement reports not exposed by OCUDU's metrics stream. See project README.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "ran_kpis")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ran_kpis")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rsrp_proxy_pusch_snr_db")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Anomaly Alerts
panels.description: Populated once the Isolation Forest / LSTM Autoencoder anomaly detectors are running and writing to the ran_kpi_anomalies measurement.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "ran_kpis")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ran_kpi_anomalies")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "is_anomaly")
